sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_list_aggregate (id INTEGER, values_list ARRAY);
SELECT id, array_aggr(values_list, 'min') AS min_value FROM test_list_aggregate GROUP BY id;
UPDATE test_list_aggregate SET values_list = array_cat(values_list, [6]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, array_aggr(values_list, 'max') AS max_value FROM test_list_aggregate GROUP BY id;
